title: He Raised $26M Betting on Probabilities, Not Guesses | Koah Labs, Nic Baird
summary: Nic Baird, founder of Koah Labs, argues that advertising rather than subscriptions is the viable monetization model for AI tools, having raised $26M on this thesis. He contends that the primary bottleneck for AI agents is not technological capability but human trust and adoption timelines.
